ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device associated with the vehicle */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account owner of the vehicle */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "battery_capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the vehicle's battery in kWh */,
  "battery_charge_level" REAL /* Current charge level of the battery as a percentage */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the vehicle's status */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was registered with the system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the vehicle is currently active in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commands" (
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle the command is sent to */,
  "command_name" TEXT /* Name of the command executed */,
  "command_status" TEXT /* Status of the command execution */,
  "created_time_stamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the command was created */,
  "command_type" TEXT /* Type of command (e.g., update, diagnostic, control) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the command (1 being the highest) */,
  "estimated_completion_time" TEXT /* Estimated time when the command should complete */,
  "actual_completion_time" TEXT /* Actual time when the command completed */,
  "initiated_by" TEXT /* User or system that initiated the command */,
  "command_data" TEXT /* Additional data or parameters associated with the command */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commands_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command that generated the error */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Code associated with the error */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the error */,
  "error_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the error (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  "retries" INTEGER /* Number of times the command was retried */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the error has been resolved */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_errors_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_uid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the device */,
  "device_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "device_firmware_version" TEXT /* Version of the firmware installed on the device */,
  "device_hardware_version" TEXT /* Version of the hardware */,
  "last_software_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last software update */,
  "is_connected" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the device is currently connected to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the account owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the account owner */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the account password */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the account has administrative privileges */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, suspended, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command history record */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command that was executed */,
  "executed_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the command was executed */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the command was successful */,
  "command_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the command execution in seconds */,
  "command_output" TEXT /* Output or result of the command execution */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that executed the command */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_history_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_history_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was recorded */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client that performed the action */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., command status, maintenance alert) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "notification_medium" TEXT /* Medium through which the notification was sent (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the status update refers to */,
  "status_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the status of the vehicle */,
  "status_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the status update was recorded */,
  "battery_temperature" REAL /* Current temperature of the battery */,
  "odometer_reading" INTEGER /* Current odometer reading of the vehicle */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the vehicle (latitude and longitude) */,
  "fuel_level" REAL /* Current fuel level of the vehicle (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_status_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "max_speed" INTEGER /* Maximum speed of the device */,
  "supported_commands" TEXT /* List of commands supported by the device */,
  "supported_features" TEXT /* List of features supported by the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "is_terminal" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the status is a terminal state (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "next_possible_status" TEXT /* Next possible status that can follow the current status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)
